items.a: SEOVALT is a WordPress plugin that puts your SEO on autopilot. It uses AI (powered by Claude) to generate blog articles, fix SEO issues, monitor Core Web Vitals, and send you weekly performance reports — all without you lifting a finger.

items.q: How does the AI article generation work?
items.a: You define your niche and target keywords in the plugin settings. SEOVALT uses Claude AI to generate fully SEO-optimized articles with proper title, meta description, headings, alt texts, and schema markup. Articles are published as drafts for your review, or automatically if you enable full autopilot.

items.q: Do I need Yoast SEO or RankMath?
items.a: No. SEOVALT works independently and can inject meta tags, canonical URLs, Open Graph tags, and Schema.org markup directly. If you already use Yoast or RankMath, SEOVALT detects them and works alongside them without conflicts.
Yes! The Free plan gives you 5 AI articles, 10 SEO fixes, and 5 PageSpeed checks per month for 1 WordPress site. No credit card required.

items.q: How do I install the plugin?
items.a: Download the SEOVALT .zip from your dashboard, then go to WordPress Admin → Plugins → Add New → Upload Plugin. After activation, paste your license key in the SEOVALT settings page.

items.q: Can I use it on multiple sites?
items.a: Yes. The Pro plan supports 3 sites and the Agency plan supports 10 sites. Each site gets its own license key generated from your dashboard.

items.q: What happens if I exceed my monthly quota?
items.a: SEOVALT will notify you when you're approaching your limit. Once reached, the affected features pause until the next month or until you upgrade. Your site won't break — existing content and fixes remain in place.
Your API keys are never stored in the plugin — all AI calls go through our secure backend. Your WordPress credentials are never sent to our servers. The plugin communicates only via your license key.
Absolutely. Cancel your subscription anytime from your dashboard → Billing. You'll keep access until the end of your billing period. No cancellation fees.
We offer a 7-day money-back guarantee on all paid plans. If SEOVALT doesn't work for you, email us within 7 days of your first payment and we'll refund you in full, no questions asked.
